action.reasoning: Observation: Exact-overlap inference with the current checkpoint scored 0.1123, worse than the previous 0.1079. Analysis: The most likely cause is that the earlier best eval used the separate dlinear_all_30.pt checkpoint, while the last submission likely used checkpoints/best.pt; both files still exist. Decision: Resubmit checkpoints/dlinear_all_30.pt with the now-restored exact-overlap-only predict.py to recover the known best before further changes.
